mapper.select: select * from my_mall.user_address where user_id = #{userId} and is_default = 1 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into my_mall.user_address(user_id, username, user_phone, is_default, province, city, region, detail_address) values(#{userId}, #{username}, #{userPhone}, #{isDefault}, #{province}, #{city}, #{region}, #{detailAddress})
